title: UiPath (PATH) Stock Rises 2.7% on AI Expansion Announcement
text: UiPath Inc. (NYSE: PATH) gained 2.7% to $10.99 on May 7, 2026, during intraday trading. The stock opened at $10.79 and reached a high of $11.09, trading on modest volume of 12.86 million shares. The robotic process automation company introduced "on-premises agentic AI capabilities for government and regulated industries," expanding its addressable market. This development signals management's strategy to position the firm as enterprise automation infrastructure. Despite today's gain, PATH remains down 36% year-to-date with a market capitalization of $5.64 billion. The stock trades well below its 52-week high of $19.84, currently near its 50-day moving average of $10.94. Meyka AI assigned PATH a B+ grade, reflecting "solid fundamentals despite near-term volatility." Wall Street consensus includes 12 Hold, 2 Buy, and 1 Sell ratings, with an average price target of $14.07—suggesting 28% upside potential from current levels. Earnings are scheduled for May 28, 2026, which could clarify management's AI monetization strategy and revenue acceleration trajectory.
